body:
I know it might seem like election day is so far away... but the truth is, it is inching closer every day. And with the left taking EVERY opportunity [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=72b7e9cff6f64f6fa449a9dbd75d520b&_e=O2QcnLvkuPZ5yHwLRy-QtlWOt8n4ceF-yd28r_aYLg2P7Ui8FLm9eRHcxa2WTxICp9ziE0h_gVlAk-rdW1Ue8-foS-JntQKXw9Am3QLBt8ablcHvmidyc7O5mW_oLRyg_xL5i1OQkKK3ssMlzDSyHY_CmC3QPBXOSkFMjYMpBzcnZdiqfTRBTJ-p7NkMrZgCBXqkhazg7D2WLoWTapK2HPpUPwFNReYpMjF56uyRJPNMSqjKMOL5kyO1_IjC8sZYsznyzTouiGzPKGLBnWbdwtjcnhl_59YLJ7xoutJ4QUJfg0oQgbFYy8hSUS4wj1pPNFMJtg_ti8KUhYsKBwJSU5i6sAlvx76aZ98Hh2sSuf69YT-nkBeUTVTSx6N9JIdJfTIyhUYszTxW7Dw4NXft_sDkYKJzvjRFe4tPJIu7Jg-aX5-zO7sHlKx10F9_hdahsgHW4VUpGPCjMr6jbxGcdA%3D%3D) Peter, I know it might seem like election day is so far away... but the truth is, it is inching closer every day. And with the radical left taking EVERY opportunity to move their socialist agenda forward, our fight gets more difficult every moment. _I know I'm prepared for the next battle, but I need you on my side now... before it's too late. _ That's why I wanted to personally invite you to be an exclusive FOUNDING MEMBER of my campaign by making a donation today. [**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER: $35**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=72b7e9cff6f64f6fa449a9dbd75d520b&_e=O2QcnLvkuPZ5yHwLRy-QtlWOt8n4ceF-yd28r_aYLg2P7Ui8FLm9eRHcxa2WTxICp9ziE0h_gVlAk-rdW1Ue8-foS-JntQKXw9Am3QLBt8ablcHvmidyc7O5mW_oLRyg_xL5i1OQkKK3ssMlzDSyHY_CmC3QPBXOSkFMjYMpBzcnZdiqfTRBTJ-p7NkMrZgCBXqkhazg7D2WLoWTapK2HPpUPwFNReYpMjF56uyRJPNMSqjKMOL5kyO1_IjC8sZY9dyq7-r6gebRlF-Qm69scm34yT4ohXHC32eXpgpP0mL2GQnh9S09KizUq7l7TzsP6W8tDxvBKYLyvVFHPPb-JmimVIn9jztcixolP9NWbYYQeHf4pJcKkl5eQQ87CUQNaCFe-OAp5sBuJ_zZ1YmvXjkSdqjJg2TK2D4M0VQBku_TLgC5Xgm5wBDSHuzLc88cA9gt3gDIyWFqM9tzid1ydQ%3D%3D) I believe our country needs leaders with the courage to do what’s right – not what’s politically correct or convenient... _and that’s exactly what I’ll do._ I took on the media, the radical left, and their cancel culture...and won. _**As governor, I will be your voice, and never let them silence you.**_ I will defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny. I will preserve your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe. And I will always protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty. As long as we stand together NOW, we will succeed. Will you accept my offer to become a founding member? [**YES: ACCEPT OFFER**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=72b7e9cff6f64f6fa449a9dbd75d520b&_e=O2QcnLvkuPZ5yHwLRy-QtlWOt8n4ceF-yd28r_aYLg2P7Ui8FLm9eRHcxa2WTxICp9ziE0h_gVlAk-rdW1Ue8-foS-JntQKXw9Am3QLBt8ablcHvmidyc7O5mW_oLRyg_xL5i1OQkKK3ssMlzDSyHY_CmC3QPBXOSkFMjYMpBzcnZdiqfTRBTJ-p7NkMrZgCBXqkhazg7D2WLoWTapK2HPpUPwFNReYpMjF56uyRJPNMSqjKMOL5kyO1_IjC8sZYW1Xbs-o5PmfLAMGEbLE3KQ8RPy3xlCpJCUGjfAF4QieD_QB4zdPpQtzvsKi8t07XQHs1h2PJCOrgWqRfAI3KnIGKi66vXo6RWb2_WjRzYdkftp2aH7vhaYHxI8f2YIQtA679fw8qKrj243m-DRuDk7cq43VxeqfVn4Edia419V1SqOCp3X-k3qUFo3nZzSd0pG5GFTMhwdOrRpNop4OpKA%3D%3D) Peter, not everyone will be able to join me today, but I know you're among the most committed supporters. I'm really counting on you as we prepare for the tough fight ahead. **Please, consider joining our exclusive list of FOUNDING MEMBERS now:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-126859](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=72b7e9cff6f64f6fa449a9dbd75d520b&_e=O2QcnLvkuPZ5yHwLRy-QtlWOt8n4ceF-yd28r_aYLg2P7Ui8FLm9eRHcxa2WTxICp9ziE0h_gVlAk-rdW1Ue8-foS-JntQKXw9Am3QLBt8ablcHvmidyc7O5mW_oLRyg_xL5i1OQkKK3ssMlzDSyHY_CmC3QPBXOSkFMjYMpBzcnZdiqfTRBTJ-p7NkMrZgCBXqkhazg7D2WLoWTapK2HPpUPwFNReYpMjF56uyRJPNMSqjKMOL5kyO1_IjC8sZYIl6DZNoTQbmIRpoG3ZU8n8dBzkuZAQXqQAgj90yUHUG5tDLzpQ5-0U41Hls_cDWGLwP_tV7nwRJipaa7i2hMC58vPRivE8nJtvxRTvZ5MCvAUH4UduUXn4qkFuq94W70cHRriRj2u2RpN9OhyD3xBbSofLf8Mh3U4w56rnvWsI998RyRlpsbmlLGs4A4iWqIMj_H0-5eNpR6bJWBfGiQbg%3D%3D)** Thank you, Sarah Huckabee Sanders |

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Judge President Biden
body:
Biden then did the exact opposite... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Judge President Biden by his Actions, Not by his Words](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden preaches unity. His actions are far from it. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Inaugural Address Joe Biden Should Give (But Probably Won't)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-d/)
At noon today, on the West front of the Capitol building, Joe Biden will be sworn in as the 46th President of the United States. I'll be there. Here's the speech he ought to give (but probably won't.) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Time for Healing](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-u/)
It's been one week since the tragic attack on the US Capitol Building. This week the 25th Amendment and another impeachment are on the table. Here are my thoughts. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Georgia Disaster](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog I discuss yesterday's Senate runoff in Georgia and the consequential implications. I also give my take on today's joint session of the House and Senate to formally count the votes of the Electoral College. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juulkyyk-kujkulhluu-f/)

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people.

I'm writing today because **[we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57344379:sAEtsRKN9:m:1:2247059263:B590CF49052293819DE3AB51C7BCDBA2:r)**. I am running for Governor to solve the problems that these career politicians have created and to bring a conservative voice back to Richmond. &zwnj
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S3o93uaCD2_168_scU62AztFIj2uqxs1TCKNkOzrkAaSrtZl-xW4tRAwBrQOJrSans5v4sq6oHfnl5hJp2pcC2w5Cf9oJml-dkTUo9BOtVfQKJSNsmGT7Gmw_CR7MW94FW5p0smbjE5LvJ3n9nfK4WDQZ4iebi3medNeiyYd5nbmWPum_sidsOOYgvngOLe1q2JIZ4yzQPMzeyyouM_5MFtjuG-5BqBYxA252eHNu39VGSNwSCp_aVkYOculM6zsD0qBc2ZUSpxf85gxC005n2ck0N4V8zdJjmVREZ8AyQPYInmID58PIUpWGHm3ngGcH0_Y6U2ns94FLjuHlwQeH7n2e9LPNNL63E7fLS39EBso6k9OXBCFxQ64qEPi62qz6xD3BsPPcmM06Sm1THQodQ==&c=H0lHDgfjUfXYFhdTWe_0RITAeGkixnIt7Cpi12a-cELzpuKTMa6VIg==&ch=60igNeNCioSPn1rAiBjR8PxlxNzxRayTNKTfHC77rVZyhkl4efT2Lg==) Friend,

For eight years, Northam, McAuliffe and the career politicians in Richmond have pushed extreme and out of touch ideas while showing no interest in fixing the problems plaguing our Commonwealth. They turned a blind eye to violent crime, shuttered small businesses, and passed massive tax increases that hit us right in the middle of a pandemic. It's been nearly a year, and the Governor, the career politicians and the bureaucrats in charge have spent millions of dollars to rename schools, BUT STILL have NO REAL PLAN to get our schools OPEN.

I am running for Governor to solve the problems that these career politicians have created and to bring a conservative voice back to Richmond. It's time that Virginia had a Governor who was focused more on helping Virginia businesses recover from the coronavirus pandemic and opening our schools than catering to cancel culture radicals.

As a businessman and political outsider, I know what it takes to deliver real results and to create jobs and opportunities that career politicians have failed to deliver. This past year, I started the _Virginia 30 Day Fund_ to help create jobs and give struggling small businesses the resources they needed to survive the economic hardships that the coronavirus pandemic created.

I am committed to getting Virginia back on track by opening our schools, supporting our men and women in blue and rebuilding our economy.

It is time we shake up Richmond. clean_body: I am running for Governor to solve the problems that these career politicians have created and to bring a conservative voice back to Richmond. &zwnj == Friend, For eight years, Northam, McAuliffe and the career politicians in Richmond have pushed extreme and out of touch ideas while showing no interest in fixing the problems plaguing our Commonwealth. They turned a blind eye to violent crime, shuttered small businesses, and passed massive tax increases that hit us right in the middle of a pandemic. It's been nearly a year, and the Governor, the career politicians and the bureaucrats in charge have spent millions of dollars to rename schools, BUT STILL have NO REAL PLAN to get our schools OPEN. I am running for Governor to solve the problems that these career politicians have created and to bring a conservative voice back to Richmond. It's time that Virginia had a Governor who was focused more on helping Virginia businesses recover from the coronavirus pandemic and opening our schools than catering to cancel culture radicals. As a businessman and political outsider, I know what it takes to deliver real results and to create jobs and opportunities that career politicians have failed to deliver. This past year, I started the Virginia 30 Day Fund to help create jobs and give struggling small businesses the resources they needed to survive the economic hardships that the coronavirus pandemic created. I am committed to getting Virginia back on track by opening our schools, supporting our men and women in blue and rebuilding our economy. It is time we shake up Richmond. == == == == == == With your help, we can get Virginia leading again. I have spent my life building small businesses and creating jobs, and now it's time to get Virginia out of this horrible mess! Virginia needs leaders who will put political correctness aside and solve problems. Friend, will you stand with me today as I fight to deliver common sense leadership to Virginia and work to end the extreme agenda being pushed by career politicians in Richmond? == == Thank you so much, Pete Snyder | Get involved with Team Pete today! Follow us on == and ==. ==** PAID FOR BY PETE FOR GOVERNOR PO BOX 26141, Alexandria, VA 22313 == | | PETE FOR GOVERNOR | PO Box 26141, Alexandria, VA 22313 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

This is not just any fundraising goal: it's the first one of the New Year, and it will set the tone for the rest of 2021. Rodney Davis needs your full support behind him so he can keep protecting our conservative principles of small government, strict adherence to our Constitution, American strength at home and abroad, and the sanctity of human life.
With Democrats in full control of the White House, Congress, and the Senate, fighting to protect our conservative values will be harder than ever before. Rodney needs your support now more than ever, **which is why we MUST meet our big fundraising goal**.

name: Team Young Alerts
subject: Here’s the bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are already organizing to win back every last seat they lost -- including this one.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ybYcpdVygRLvYKCFuep6ptV4yzpDcWYbivhlJefu678GuS3hieR6Ek-ye8wAzfrWAgTNyrhEiUrVqv72f1JcYZ5i-Ry-W3evNNUqmu7t0akijdavquPPE465BjO6JYVQmT7g9Fnfg6MSVQR-sDQ4HSa67MLhuZJ5sIuBZW_-GmhRwbVwNqOu_65YiDX2_ggl8FLDS_CQOFkUbCkCGu_FpqOPx6yhp7pGuvs3OkiHa4tAmfnWRGMFcKqPLarP-Ii4sEpt4sEIgPjr47vJth_qzqJFvrBSB4nZcoCpulju5TZtQhYX8_NfH4xp7DxToirH6XFEH-BlAH-Gt4RX72pK0X-3qMkA458QR_ZFE4jQpHRseD25OVI2ld-jy6WqMbTrH3y-_H2AA6JHCbgHO1eULhKFWrgZnIXB7GrtFeJ2jDQ=&c=dZ892ublEz6nSJyKs_sQcspQ2U4A7ZEPqOuQ_B3UOlzZpFQRPQu06A==&ch=ywiNPKm-xwZPTgtg5oU83LB_RBSR3hJ6dzYsAU5ME5riHH9y73QysQ==)
---
**Here 's the good news:** we won. We flipped this seat from blue to red -- _the first to unseat an incumbent CA Democrat in nearly 3 decades_ \-- and restored some common-sense leadership to Washington.

**Here 's the not so great news:** We won by the smallest of margins -- 50.6%-49.% to be exact. And, we squeaked out victory nearly _two weeks_ after Election Day.

**Here 's the bad news:** After suffering major, unexpected losses across the nation, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are already organizing to win back every last seat they lost -- _including this one._

**That makes Sunday 's midnight deadline -- the very first critical deadline of the year -- all the more important. [Friend, can we count on you to help reach our goal, defend this seat from the Far Left, and win back the House Majority?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ybYcpdVygRLvYKCFuep6ptV4yzpDcWYbivhlJefu678GuS3hieR6Et37yUQ264j7UAFXWRK71ggph6z9UWRPAaA7bZXCi6xe4JZBcBQApipwbVqDfwWM6u3LKHacwEOCXSnQDEqYZ4u2YiDgntn_eKKOKbbtL2ImpncAaGVzIbG1Rmb8hXqbrLzSYEVKHV0paFl5_j8wbdLeowjL9K_9R6GRVBy0XSed1ZXWhURwSaWEerxKN4vr1IjqIC7NEBxYTl54R3YXAXOvLow-3_jaYMkrIOz5v40EN3vihbrN1ybW0j2W9vx-1G5n0WK24uASZo4dl50oJTX1HVJhZkGlinAzXu3NxawdqgLaRWa67UXxirSQ9yKKBOO7EcGSxLG4T9EpLWtQT1A_V_ZgpzkLC0joUtrgCb6IEFgnFf6mFg4=&c=dZ892ublEz6nSJyKs_sQcspQ2U4A7ZEPqOuQ_B3UOlzZpFQRPQu06A==&ch=ywiNPKm-xwZPTgtg5oU83LB_RBSR3hJ6dzYsAU5ME5riHH9y73QysQ==)**

Reaching our goal is the only way to ensure we have the resources we need to run ads, support volunteers, send mail, reach out to voters, spread our common-sense message, and so much more. Right now we're $24,102.19 short -- but with three days left and the support of our grassroots team, we're confident we can make our mark.

_We have to._ The future of the House Majority is on the line. We only need to flip a handful from BLUE to RED to restore a common-sense agenda to Congress. It's going to be hard. It's going to take all of us, and we have to start now. But if we give it everything we've got, we can win.

**With just 3 days to go until the first critical deadline of our campaign this year,[Friend, can you rush in an emergency grassroots donation? Even $5 will have a direct and immediate impact on this race.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ybYcpdVygRLvYKCFuep6ptV4yzpDcWYbivhlJefu678GuS3hieR6Et37yUQ264j7UAFXWRK71ggph6z9UWRPAaA7bZXCi6xe4JZBcBQApipwbVqDfwWM6u3LKHacwEOCXSnQDEqYZ4u2YiDgntn_eKKOKbbtL2ImpncAaGVzIbG1Rmb8hXqbrLzSYEVKHV0paFl5_j8wbdLeowjL9K_9R6GRVBy0XSed1ZXWhURwSaWEerxKN4vr1IjqIC7NEBxYTl54R3YXAXOvLow-3_jaYMkrIOz5v40EN3vihbrN1ybW0j2W9vx-1G5n0WK24uASZo4dl50oJTX1HVJhZkGlinAzXu3NxawdqgLaRWa67UXxirSQ9yKKBOO7EcGSxLG4T9EpLWtQT1A_V_ZgpzkLC0joUtrgCb6IEFgnFf6mFg4=&c=dZ892ublEz6nSJyKs_sQcspQ2U4A7ZEPqOuQ_B3UOlzZpFQRPQu06A==&ch=ywiNPKm-xwZPTgtg5oU83LB_RBSR3hJ6dzYsAU5ME5riHH9y73QysQ==)**

Young came to America searching for a better life. With hard work and determination, she put herself through college, started a business, raised a family, and became one of the first Korean American women in Congress. She's advocated for victims of domestic violence, our nation's veterans, and over-burdened taxpayers, and will continue to advocate for hardworking Americans -- but she can't do it alone.

_We 've defied the odds before, and with your help, we'll do it again. _

[**We have only 3 days left.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ybYcpdVygRLvYKCFuep6ptV4yzpDcWYbivhlJefu678GuS3hieR6Et37yUQ264j7UAFXWRK71ggph6z9UWRPAaA7bZXCi6xe4JZBcBQApipwbVqDfwWM6u3LKHacwEOCXSnQDEqYZ4u2YiDgntn_eKKOKbbtL2ImpncAaGVzIbG1Rmb8hXqbrLzSYEVKHV0paFl5_j8wbdLeowjL9K_9R6GRVBy0XSed1ZXWhURwSaWEerxKN4vr1IjqIC7NEBxYTl54R3YXAXOvLow-3_jaYMkrIOz5v40EN3vihbrN1ybW0j2W9vx-1G5n0WK24uASZo4dl50oJTX1HVJhZkGlinAzXu3NxawdqgLaRWa67UXxirSQ9yKKBOO7EcGSxLG4T9EpLWtQT1A_V_ZgpzkLC0joUtrgCb6IEFgnFf6mFg4=&c=dZ892ublEz6nSJyKs_sQcspQ2U4A7ZEPqOuQ_B3UOlzZpFQRPQu06A==&ch=ywiNPKm-xwZPTgtg5oU83LB_RBSR3hJ6dzYsAU5ME5riHH9y73QysQ==)

Thank you,

Team Young Alerts

* * *
_During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --__[**endorse Young Kim here!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ybYcpdVygRLvYKCFuep6ptV4yzpDcWYbivhlJefu678GuS3hieR6Eo9heYQPEgltKuTgfeuqsyb4oFN13gCxWSzCZ0qrMn5Nn2sUJvweanCmGRAefhvBxOCAJrGtccwHi_Akb5CkpQiCDmXafundUNeV-0UubAVJJsjwQ_yq13ImthwznkhG77QWTJAu8f9C613s7dYvNuwQjIuIsWUAhxkTrWtQ75lzfwahw8XXSW0BtmbVCB01QYBdgqUeFYALHAe0Oxkzu9VgnTyvIDsZ6pdORVPznGYDSGgUE6rDXiPCiPy99PYWu5R2cZZLSSftv22bsoLS7-PLQb_uKOdgA40mCghLHR4k5KAa983OeNJ9iNEAHjVwDZYhWi1d85SqgCAcvFeSydkn8pHgHk8Lrl4bTWStSQ93&c=dZ892ublEz6nSJyKs_sQcspQ2U4A7ZEPqOuQ_B3UOlzZpFQRPQu06A==&ch=ywiNPKm-xwZPTgtg5oU83LB_RBSR3hJ6dzYsAU5ME5riHH9y73QysQ==)_

It is through these policies that Iowa will come back stronger than ever... But, Friend, we can't do this without your help. Liberal groups are already rallying their base to try and smear Governor Reynolds' record and run false attack ads against her. == == Gov. Reynolds will never stop fighting for you, Friend. body:
Michelle was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman with her single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, she discovered a broken political system that was taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. Can I count on you to rush in a 300% matched donation by midnight tonight to help Michelle defeat Pelosi's candidate?

Michelle was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman with her single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, she discovered a broken political system that was taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. She watched her mother be harassed by a government agency and her mom's small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight.

It was then Michelle decided enough is enough. She ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very agency that took advantage of my mother -- and won. Since then she's returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, Michelle will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet.

clean_body: Michelle was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman with her single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, she discovered a broken political system that was taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. Can I count on you to rush in a 300% matched donation by midnight tonight to help Michelle defeat Pelosi's candidate? ** . == Friend, we don't have much time, so I'll make this quick. We are just 72 hours out from our first critical campaign deadline this year and right now we are $21,917.19 short of where we need to be. Making our mark is the first step to defending this top-targeted seat AND winning back the House for Republicans -- it's the only way to ensure we have the resources we need to spread our conservative message and grow our grassroots team. Can I count on you to rush in a 300% matched donation by midnight tonight to help Michelle defeat Pelosi 's candidate? She's counting on you to get us to the finish line. == | == == == == == == == == 300% Match Live Until 11:59 PM Tonight Michelle was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman with her single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, she discovered a broken political system that was taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. She watched her mother be harassed by a government agency and her mom's small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight. It was then Michelle decided enough is enough. She ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very agency that took advantage of my mother -- and won. Since then she's returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, Michelle will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet. But she can 't do it alone. ==** Our opponent -- the one we defeated just months ago \-- has already declared a rematch. This race will not be easy, but it's important. == Remember all donations made before midnight tonight will be 300% matched. But don 't wait until the deadline to chip in. Thank you, Steph Team Steel Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

I wish I had better news, Friend. With only two days until our critical campaign deadline, we simply aren't where we need to be. Here's why reaching our goal is so important:
* _Pelosi and the National Democrats spent $20+ million against us over the past four years. _
* _The Democrats are already preparing for the next election, getting everything in place to spend tens of millions to target must-win seats like this one._
* _We won by the smallest of margins nearly two weeks after election day. This is currently the second bluest seat held by a Republican and it will take all of us working together to win again._

**Reaching our goal ensures we have the resources to defend this seat and win back the House Majority for Republicans.[Friend, can we count on you to join the team? We have less than 72 hours to get back on track.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxDiNoJ34xIukBYYZrqdppYfur8-hevJs25RVHzVbnyDqHgTNJYvsvkm6tufs72o211NP_Oer1_jv3jqU7gszFbulbkAEGVoU9Lkyj9yvFF_iwd0Hk_oII3kWCz0VHgLLXiCCoDjHIk-7a8zAfuqtRZaC9PkcJGb7nMtmv8YFjB-w9IJexEGB2rLxNUKjh8O160K77quVEfoLzoQlbPEV7kETcK9YU0PVJjErxDfWeC03sy0iyLm818wBNrwsopmsfJXfl7fIPnXwlCqI9ZsxLFBv9U7RFY3qMg1RzqVJhjvBlh_XT9gXmKxGaSyvn_Ugk40mIlBBfiB28FNkhtt_FeRnOopUCy1ETPNT5V9sWVTird0dqdbHq16IdFEfUKzmNaszjBtfm-mSTohTyghUJLmFq_O5sHia7BBzJAK3kieaXVjL8WW4E41T5Wqk04vAQniQmhlgFg=&c=AHj7damEoGVokP-Q7RKx_Qf6W3Ri1L-sdca3WR0Ck2nNAAafgxoDkQ==&ch=jPjquvAnjnvmGIcS3jm77yB9vdJUnkwD-rHqfw3z9UNmXB51qvcnrg==)**

What we do now -- _building our infrastructure, spreading our common-sense message, growing our grassroots team, and so much more_ \-- will go a long way to determine the outcome in 2022. With the House Majority's fate resting on this seat, we can't take any chances.

[**We have less than 72 hours. Can we count on you to chip in before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to ensure we meet our goal, defend this seat, and win back the House for Republicans?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bxDiNoJ34xIukBYYZrqdppYfur8-hevJs25RVHzVbnyDqHgTNJYvsvkm6tufs72o211NP_Oer1_jv3jqU7gszFbulbkAEGVoU9Lkyj9yvFF_iwd0Hk_oII3kWCz0VHgLLXiCCoDjHIk-7a8zAfuqtRZaC9PkcJGb7nMtmv8YFjB-w9IJexEGB2rLxNUKjh8O160K77quVEfoLzoQlbPEV7kETcK9YU0PVJjErxDfWeC03sy0iyLm818wBNrwsopmsfJXfl7fIPnXwlCqI9ZsxLFBv9U7RFY3qMg1RzqVJhjvBlh_XT9gXmKxGaSyvn_Ugk40mIlBBfiB28FNkhtt_FeRnOopUCy1ETPNT5V9sWVTird0dqdbHq16IdFEfUKzmNaszjBtfm-mSTohTyghUJLmFq_O5sHia7BBzJAK3kieaXVjL8WW4E41T5Wqk04vAQniQmhlgFg=&c=AHj7damEoGVokP-Q7RKx_Qf6W3Ri1L-sdca3WR0Ck2nNAAafgxoDkQ==&ch=jPjquvAnjnvmGIcS3jm77yB9vdJUnkwD-rHqfw3z9UNmXB51qvcnrg==)

An immigrant and proud conservative woman, she flipped CA-39 from blue to red. Outspent, with millions of dollars put behind ads that attacked her record of fighting for hardworking Americans, Young defied the odds -- but she didn't do it alone. In fact, it was only possible because of you, Friend.

That's why, with you on our side, I'm confident we'll win. Because nothing is more powerful than our grassroots team.

Thank you,

Martin
Team Young

| | Friend, The recent news surrounding Gamestop stock probably made you wonder: should I invest? Well, we are not financial advisors so we can't offer advice on that front, but what we can tell you about is the Minnesota Political Campaign Refund (PCR) Program. Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and **receive a full refund from the state.** That's right, your contribution to building a better future for all Minnesotans will be _completely refunded_. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wdc7ga0CxjvQdWjAygdb915DcvjbkwC8yKdJ6ljnefM=/RWMJF7hRpY63UzKmu_qgJi6IBZCjdXKb8oK80TP1ExI=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=012821) _ _ [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wdc7ga0CxjvQdWjAygdb915DcvjbkwC8yKdJ6ljnefM=/RWMJF7hRpY63UzKmu_qgJi6IBZCjdXKb8oK80TP1ExI=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=012821) [**Or another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wdc7ga0CxjvQdWjAygdb915DcvjbkwC8yKdJ6ljnefM=/RWMJF7hRpY63UzKmu_qgJi6IBZCjdXKb8oK80TP1ExI=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=012821) Your refundable contribution will help us hold the majority in the Minnesota House of Representatives. Don't miss this opportunity to show your support so that every Minnesotan can weather this pandemic and thrive beyond it. Thank you, Minnesota House DFL _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wdc7ga0CxjvQdWjAygdb915DcvjbkwC8yKdJ6ljnefM=/RWMJF7hRpY63UzKmu_qgJi6IBZCjdXKb8oK80TP1ExI=?refcode=012821)

clean_body: | | Friend, The recent news surrounding Gamestop stock probably made you wonder: should I invest? Well, we are not financial advisors so we can't offer advice on that front, but what we can tell you about is the Minnesota Political Campaign Refund (PCR) Program. Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and receive a full refund from the state. That's right, your contribution to building a better future for all Minnesotans will be completely refunded. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately Your refundable contribution will help us hold the majority in the Minnesota House of Representatives. Don't miss this opportunity to show your support so that every Minnesotan can weather this pandemic and thrive beyond it. Thank you, Minnesota House DFL | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. We are prohibited from taking PAC and lobbyist contributions during the legislative session. name: Tim Scott
subject: It's time for us to stand up, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

As Joe Biden and the socialist Democrats promote their job-killing, tax-raising agenda, I think it's time for a different vision for America.

Republicans need to push back on what the Democrats are doing and stand up for those who don't want to see our country ruined by socialism.

[**We need to stand up for the American Dream. **](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/its-time-to-stand/?utm_campaign=20210128_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046752-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210128_its-time-for-us-to-stand-up-first-name/)

My family has lived the American Dream that's now becoming endangered. We rose from cotton to Congress in one lifetime through hard work, perseverance, and the grace of God.

There are millions of families like mine across this nation -- full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream. Sadly, Democrats want to make it harder for them to succeed.

**I am working each and every day in the Senate to save the American Dream from socialism, but I need your help to share my positive, conservative vision with the country. **

[**Will you help me stand up for the American Dream and stop socialism by making a generous donation today? **](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/its-time-to-stand/?utm_campaign=20210128_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046752-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210128_its-time-for-us-to-stand-up-first-name/)

I need your support to withstand attacks from the Democrat political machine and keep pushing back on their tax-and-spend agenda.

But by working together, you and I can provide a new conservative vision and save the American Dream from socialism.

So, Friend, will you stand with me?

Tim Scott

[DONATE NOW](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/its-time-to-stand/?utm_campaign=20210128_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046752-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210128_its-time-for-us-to-stand-up-first-name/)

name: Moms in Office
subject: No Off Years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24343843/270405284/-2094846095?refcode=0128&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwYzQ3YzU5LWEwNjEtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dHPOP2aJhhFpJlyP5B1u7Hv2zlctFHMycqxjcjnbTS0=)
Peter,
January has been a busy month. From the Georgia runoffs, we all saw that it takes year-round organizing to win elections in tough districts. As moms, we know what it's like to work around the clock. And this year has special elections for Congress, as well as state and local elections that will matter to policies that affect many families. So we're rolling up our sleeves.
We're still going to focus on supporting moms running for office. Our biggest expenditures are directly to support candidates. But this year, we're not stopping there. We're helping build the bench of women running for office, by providing information sessions and building a community of moms in politics. We're rolling out a platform to help candidates who aren't moms, but who are fighting for policies to help families. Women are bearing the brunt of this pandemic. If not now, when are we going to pass policies like paid family and sick leave to create a social safety net for working families in America? This is why we need moms and allies in office to champion bills to get us out of this mess. Our allies platform will support candidates with a policy agenda that aligns with our values.
[Together, we can do this.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24343844/270405285/-2094846095?refcode=0128&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwYzQ3YzU5LWEwNjEtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dHPOP2aJhhFpJlyP5B1u7Hv2zlctFHMycqxjcjnbTS0=)
We can do this - we can pass reforms to improve the lives of all Americans. But we can't do this without you. We're a grassroots organization. In 2020, more than 1000 of y'all chipped in to help us support 23 candidates. Just like there's no off year in organizing, there's no off year in donations. We understand that the past year has been hard on so many women and families - if you can't chip in right now, we understand. We appreciate every dollar we raise, so we can keep working to support candidates who want to implement policies that help families.
We're stepping up. Will you join us?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24343845/270405286/-2094846095?refcode=0128&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwYzQ3YzU5LWEwNjEtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dHPOP2aJhhFpJlyP5B1u7Hv2zlctFHMycqxjcjnbTS0=)
Thanks for all you do,
Elisa Cardnell
Executive Director

#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States

clean_body: = Peter, January has been a busy month. From the Georgia runoffs, we all saw that it takes year-round organizing to win elections in tough districts. As moms, we know what it's like to work around the clock. And this year has special elections for Congress, as well as state and local elections that will matter to policies that affect many families. So we're rolling up our sleeves. We're still going to focus on supporting moms running for office. Our biggest expenditures are directly to support candidates. But this year, we're not stopping there. We're helping build the bench of women running for office, by providing information sessions and building a community of moms in politics. We're rolling out a platform to help candidates who aren't moms, but who are fighting for policies to help families. Women are bearing the brunt of this pandemic. If not now, when are we going to pass policies like paid family and sick leave to create a social safety net for working families in America? This is why we need moms and allies in office to champion bills to get us out of this mess. Our allies platform will support candidates with a policy agenda that aligns with our values. = We can do this - we can pass reforms to improve the lives of all Americans. But we can't do this without you. We're a grassroots organization. In 2020, more than 1000 of y'all chipped in to help us support 23 candidates. Just like there's no off year in organizing, there's no off year in donations. We understand that the past year has been hard on so many women and families - if you can't chip in right now, we understand. We appreciate every dollar we raise, so we can keep working to support candidates who want to implement policies that help families. We're stepping up. Will you join us? = Thanks for all you do, Elisa Cardnell Executive Director Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . [**We have a big task ahead of us in 2021. name: Greg Stanton
subject: Join Me To Denounce Racism, Xenophobia, and Religious Intolerance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

Though we've only just begun week two of the Biden Administration, The President has already begun working hard - signing Executive Orders into law, including [ending the discriminatory Muslim travel ban](https://act.myngp.com/el/CBjo8HDnhgVr3jxTdj_PgJQKs1PtklDPsaRFHgMXKyc=/aC9B8qGUZIwMwTmIP66g06UZ4mlvL8QGn8jYp9D6eTo=), [ reversing the funding for the failed border wall](https://act.myngp.com/el/CBjo8HDnhgVr3jxTdj_PgJQKs1PtklDPsaRFHgMXKyc=/9sUIv7pvfmlVYXC9x4aunw5oMaGa_vYAI6LeBbHcgzg=), [and protecting Dreamers](https://act.myngp.com/el/CBjo8HDnhgVr3jxTdj_PgJQKs1PtklDPsaRFHgMXKyc=/GFvtVi8UQEGLWjd_Oj64PHbTeVUvEPwJ6j3UjpiiByU=).

The United States Constitution makes it clear that we are a nation of inclusiveness and religious freedom. The Executive Orders signed by President Biden are steps in the right direction as we recommit to building a nation of tolerance, diversity, equity, and morality. I stand with the President and support reversing Trump's discriminatory DACA decision. Many Dreamers have been here their entire lives and have made incredible contributions to our nation as members of our Armed Forces. Some have even become physicians and nurses who serve on the frontlines in our healthcare facilities during this deadly pandemic. We are unquestionably a stronger nation because of them.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CBjo8HDnhgVr3jxTdj_PgJQKs1PtklDPsaRFHgMXKyc=/XTNNx3TUNeQH2uxdZ-HOg6xx-mYQIY8aaQ-4JjlF6VA=?refcode=X_012821_BidenEO_A)

I need your help to make sure we can continue to fight for these American values that make us stronger. [Can I count on you to chip in to help us continue to support legislation that helps us build a stronger America?](https://act.myngp.com/el/CBjo8HDnhgVr3jxTdj_PgJQKs1PtklDPsaRFHgMXKyc=/XTNNx3TUNeQH2uxdZ-HOg6xx-mYQIY8aaQ-4JjlF6VA=?refcode=X_012821_BidenEO_A)

Thank you for your continued support,
\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/CBjo8HDnhgVr3jxTdj_PgJQKs1PtklDPsaRFHgMXKyc=/kevJnHbk28qQf3a7ZUPIZIh-nULdn5IHU9y7C3WTQkg=).

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: [LEAKED] Democrats’ First 100 Days…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Our work never ends
body:
Judicial Watch’s work is exploding in volume and growing in historic importance. In just the past few weeks, for example...

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch's work is _exploding in volume and growing in historic importance_. _In just the past few weeks_ , for example...

* We _forced the release_ of 210 pages of records from the State Department showing that in 2017 then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch warned of corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. Yet in her 2019 testimony in the House impeachment proceedings against then-President Trump, she told lawmakers she knew little about Burisma...that she only learned of its connections to the Biden family through "press reports." _Ambassador Yovanovitch clearly knew more about Burisma than she testified to before Congress_!
* We _forced the release_ of an additional 38 pages of records from State showing that a senior Obama State Department official said he was told by a senior Ukraine Prosecutor that he was offered "high-level" access to Hillary Clinton's 2016 presidential campaign by the same Democratic lobbying firm that worked for Burisma Holdings. _This "smoking gun" email ties Hunter Biden's Burisma work to an influence-peddling operation involving the_ _Clinton presidential campaign_ ...which the Deep State wanted to cover up!

* We just _sued_ seven federal agencies for records of former Obama administration officials requesting to "unmask" retired Lt. General Michael Flynn, then-President Trump's first National Security Advisor. _These "unmasking" requests show the Deep State's total commitment to destroying Donald Trump's_ _presidency_.

The need to police our elected and non-elected officials never ends...
Because the truth is that politicians in _either_ party or secretive government bureaucrats cannot police themselves - it just does not work! That's why no one is working harder than Judicial Watch to challenge Washington's culture of corruption.
But we can do this essential work because... _and only because_ ...of the generous support we receive from patriotic Americans like you.
**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52744&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjgxNjE3MDY=)_** , we can and are refusing to let corrupt politicians like Joe Biden or Hillary Clinton off the hook just because they won or lost an election.
_Nor will we let Deep State officials within our federal agencies escape accountability for undermining our Constitution_! When they refuse to comply with our nation's open records laws or violate other statutes, we challenge them in the courts. And since Congress is completely untrustworthy in its oversight role, we will most certainly conduct more investigations and file more lawsuits in 2021.
Indeed, we have a lot of hard work ahead this year...
We are also leading the way challenging illegal state and local sanctuary policies that cripple immigration law enforcement...including our historic lawsuits challenging truly _deadly_ sanctuary policies in San Francisco and Santa Clara County, California.
_This work is critically important now as big changes are coming_.
Joe Biden's arrival in the White House and Trump's departure is sending a powerful message to those seeking to enter the United States illegally...the door that was closed will soon be open!
But not if we have anything to say about it (and we do - plenty)!
**Because Judicial Watch 's independent watchdog work leaves Congress **
**and the liberal Big Media in the dust ...and _we prove that every day_!**
But these battles are expensive...
...and we don't have the deep pockets of the government to fund our independent investigations, litigation and public education...instead, we rely on you and other conservative Americans who share our commitment to upholding the rule of law.
**_[That's why I hope you will make your best contribution today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52744&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjgxNjE3MDY=)_**. _With your support our work can literally change the course of history_.
Yours truly,

Thomas Fitton
President
Judicial Watch
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52744&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMjgxNjE3MDY=)

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: TOP SUPPORTERS ONLY: Please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

From packing the Supreme Court to eliminating the filibuster to raising taxes on hard-working Americans, we must take emergency action before it's too late.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Add your voice →
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Last week, Joe Biden was sworn in as the 46th President of the United States, and with his help, we’ve already made great strides to healing our nation.

Moments after taking office, Biden’s administration immediately went to work on repairing the cracks in our nation. Within just one day, the United States rejoined the Paris Climate Agreement to help tackle climate change across the globe. And within just one week, the President put a pause on new offshore drilling, an important step to protect our state's pristine coastline.

While President Biden and his administration have already taken leaps towards a more progressive nation, we still have a lot of work ahead of us. That’s why I want to hear directly from you on what your top priorities are and what you think our new administration should focus on.

[**_Will you take a moment to fill out our Priorities Survey? We’re hitting the ground running, but we need your help!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24348171/270422818/857096662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU4ODUwMC1iMTYxLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xyXtTf-pXExLeR_2p9SeM9Fci1uB7tRRv8wcUgK0lQw=&emci=17772d1a-ae61-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=89588500-b161-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)

My colleagues and I are excited to work with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. There has never been a more important time for us to course-correct our politics, and the secret ingredient to making that lasting change is [**_adding your voice._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24348173/270422820/857096662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU4ODUwMC1iMTYxLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xyXtTf-pXExLeR_2p9SeM9Fci1uB7tRRv8wcUgK0lQw=&emci=17772d1a-ae61-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=89588500-b161-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HwkwHBNOofHsOiUVo2Q2Hkpd9zYpGsUy_lu-Y7PVsvd9_4oGhjIpJl8Kqo_hyYRC9yQiNoM7gDOUEMBtMqOG11yZQfcQi8yVYBznoFWgmLKdVQMqQ7Ckc7AWaDE9lmk-Ewcz0O4TAdDiJAIGkrBJhYGNEVozt9vyukjKulWRGqRa7TwqTDw7ZyeTkf72aHpF4Qvu__gslbiSdxaBN7vlB6Jmmgo1sQxoBtYBXMwFnyvcoSOFExlH4cg8eeyEN2Q5LE176rLXEFzoP6gqtC_i3VINlm3gamzDI0zQbOo56D-PS6PZxwgD3DWHMzskSB9eRQl0DWpPNmp_el3m1UQL2H5pvNScgnbQFBl9WDy39zzEJxCZKCHnyQ7mNf3SXuT6KhvkhaL7prG8CAmuevQ-LkFCra7kyxi0crJbOTKK6h5npyzWjXXLb45W9bKCDr85PCKcud616OU=&c=BoD0k7g1-lTwE7I3s81JgenrxpaQwHQHUCz4T6DhrKolZoLAOmp2SQ==&ch=-_htLvzcYcE8HiF-ENUHd1tykOXFJsWY1q0PZ6S-PlR-s0q6PnGMZg==)
Friend,
Congressman Jeff Van Drew is one of the strongest Conservatives in Washington and will work day in and day out to fight back against the Radical Left's Socialist agenda. He is serious about defeating policies like defunding the Police, Medicare for All, and the Green New Deal, which would completely alter our way of life in South Jersey. We need Conservative Republicans like Jeff Van Drew in Congress if we are going to stand up to President Biden's executive orders and fight for A STRONG AMERICA.
**[**Support Jeff in this fight for A STRONG AMERICA**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HwkwHBNOofHsOiUVo2Q2Hkpd9zYpGsUy_lu-Y7PVsvd9_4oGhjIpJl8Kqo_hyYRC9yQiNoM7gDOUEMBtMqOG11yZQfcQi8yVYBznoFWgmLKdVQMqQ7Ckc7AWaDE9lmk-Ewcz0O4TAdDiJAIGkrBJhYGNEVozt9vyukjKulWRGqRa7TwqTDw7ZyeTkf72aHpF4Qvu__gslbiSdxaBN7vlB6Jmmgo1sQxoBtYBXMwFnyvcoSOFExlH4cg8eeyEN2Q5LE176rLXEFzoP6gqtC_i3VINlm3gamzDI0zQbOo56D-PS6PZxwgD3DWHMzskSB9eRQl0DWpPNmp_el3m1UQL2H5pvNScgnbQFBl9WDy39zzEJxCZKCHnyQ7mNf3SXuT6KhvkhaL7prG8CAmuevQ-LkFCra7kyxi0crJbOTKK6h5npyzWjXXLb45W9bKCDr85PCKcud616OU=&c=BoD0k7g1-lTwE7I3s81JgenrxpaQwHQHUCz4T6DhrKolZoLAOmp2SQ==&ch=-_htLvzcYcE8HiF-ENUHd1tykOXFJsWY1q0PZ6S-PlR-s0q6PnGMZg==)**
Jeff stood with President Trump and is committed to defending President Trump's America First Agenda. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have been busy. They spent their first week pushing their radical agenda and signing OVER THIRTY Executive Orders.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: The Swamp Monsters don’t like this at all
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
The need for reform in Washington has never been greater, and I have a solution. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5d0ff80eb151c790/51acd4dedee43697c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, **We need reform in Washington, and we need it NOW.** That’s why I introduced legislation on Capitol Hill this week to hopefully change the way we do things around here – for the better. We need transparency and accountability, and I believe that the Roadmap to Congressional Reform is the best first step we can take. Trust in Congress is at historic lows, but I know that we can do better for the American people. By implementing important reforms like term limits and eliminating earmarks, we’re going to go a long way towards ending the appearance of corruption that plagues us and causes many to label DC a swamp. The Roadmap also includes measures to restrict pay and recess before a Congressional budget is passed in a timely manner, stop the Revolving Doors Act, and requires that there be time to read every bill before it’s voted on. It’s hard to believe these commonsense practices aren’t already in place!
I’m working hard to find solutions to the problems Americans face every day. Will you please help me by making a donation today? [**CHIP IN $5 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5d0ff80eb151c790/435db6b4d76c5555c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $10 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5d0ff80eb151c790/e9d914f34c8680f3c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $20 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5d0ff80eb151c790/98e53cb8d37c94efc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $50 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5d0ff80eb151c790/151a397b956e89d5c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $100 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5d0ff80eb151c790/49fc43285cd03955c3d6b838967d376c/34143) The politicians in Washington have let down the public too many times, and we have to stop rewarding them for their failures. Let’s make elected officials work for their constituents again — the way it has always been meant to be. Thanks for your support,
Kevin Hern [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5d0ff80eb151c790/17e2d397d5b7fcabc3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:46:59:066t Paid For By Hern For Congress

name: John Fetterman
subject: They sent the flag police after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The GOP is outraged over me flying my weed + pride flags.
#
Peter,
The Pennsylvania GOP sent the flag police to take my flags down from the state capitol building *again* this week. So my office sent me to fly them proudly once more. ✊
How it started.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1007?refcode=em20210128-74&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=74%2E434096%2E_uU4q8)
How it’s going.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1007?refcode=em20210128-74&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=74%2E434096%2E_uU4q8)
It’s kind of funny how the Pennsylvania GOP is outraged over my weed + pride flags, but *conspicuously less* outraged over past + current members of their caucus storming the U.S. Capitol earlier this month.
Annnnnd... it’s kind of flattering how they *literally* changed state law last year to stop me from flying my weed + pride flags. **You had to do that, but ok. I’m just gonna keep putting them back up.** ✅🌈
Let me be clear, Peter: I don’t put up with the Pennsylvania GOP’s political calculations — and if elected to the U.S. Senate, I won’t put up with the Senate GOP’s political calculations, either.
**[If you think Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator should be all in for legal weed and equal protection for our LGBTQIA+ communities, can you chip in $5 now? Your donation makes a *big* impact.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1007?refcode=em20210128-74&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=74%2E434096%2E_uU4q8)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/1007?refcode=em20210128-74&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=74%2E434096%2E_uU4q8)**
Thanks,
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

clean_body: The GOP is outraged over me flying my weed + pride flags. Peter, The Pennsylvania GOP sent the flag police to take my flags down from the state capitol building again this week. So my office sent me to fly them proudly once more. ✊ How it started. How it’s going. It’s kind of funny how the Pennsylvania GOP is outraged over my weed + pride flags, but conspicuously less outraged over past + current members of their caucus storming the U.S. Capitol earlier this month. Annnnnd... it’s kind of flattering how they literally changed state law last year to stop me from flying my weed + pride flags. You had to do that, but ok. I’m just gonna keep putting them back up. ✅🌈 Let me be clear, Peter: I don’t put up with the Pennsylvania GOP’s political calculations — and if elected to the U.S. Senate, I won’t put up with the Senate GOP’s political calculations, either. Thanks, John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Paid for by Fetterman for PA

We are in the middle of the pandemic and safety is our top priority. That’s why, as a campaign, we’re investing in digital outreach to reach our volunteers and voters. Our digital program needs to be fully funded in order to win this election.

We are also planning for the long game. We need to build an infrastructure of staff and, eventually, offices in every corner of Virginia. The money we raise now will indicate how much we can spend on that organizing program. It’s crucial that we hit these early goals in order to scale up.
[**INVEST $15 IN ORGANIZING**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOZcfcKrZaUmhZoZ0hJwxVLRpae4T7x4TzEfbFxuYddpqzYyHzgqlc1C6_V1_PHiCRPI0iDymrpFvdMHCDfM3-J_PwOFbZPb9osiE7N7jhjqIHwYtvuZojciKvnq79RgSGamNAVeMBBKa7WFvNddZrBXzsrYDklQ9zD9RkL-R6TZ_greAxnLssgkZscK2BoRAjhCrz8ADwO6c_4WipMXe7KRXLwmzte22D_MIP0y63i2D-26Tr2Eq-n4om9vah9nseCtM1tcKfd8eXkD9k8NVG8M/38y/QzF1g9CRTRmBw2T-AVmHaA/h4/bXE-uRjGd7Yd4nQpYUwHUzS5KfP9KGgdtLeoYrq8VVA)
